name: csilk
description: A lightweight, high-performance HTTP web framework written in C, inspired by Gin (Golang) and built on top of libuv, llhttp, nghttp2, and cJSON. Supports HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2, WebSocket, SSE, TLS, JWT auth, AI workflow, message queue, Prometheus metrics, and pluggable database drivers (SQLite, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis).

shared.description: Build shared library in addition to static
